$comment: German. Same one/other plural shape as English (proves the plural table is per-language even when two languages share a rule). German strings run long — good for pseudo-loc expansion comparison.

player.songs: {count, plural, =0 {Keine Titel} one {# Titel} other {# Titel}}
player.songsBy: {count, plural, =0 {Keine Titel von {artist}} one {# Titel von {artist}} other {# Titel von {artist}}}

profile.invited: {gender, select, male {Er hat {name} eingeladen} female {Sie hat {name} eingeladen} other {Sie haben {name} eingeladen}}

files.count: {count, plural, =0 {Keine Dateien} one {# Datei} other {# Dateien}}
